title: Knight's Optimized
description: The perfect optimization pack for minecraft 1.21.7
body:
Knight's Optimized is Made and used by VIZ Knight. It's a combination of optimization mods, and QOL mods. All mods are client side to ensure they can be used on any server. Please enjoy this perfect optimization pack for 1.21.1.

Lowfire and lowshield pack can be found at [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

Custom Totems can be found at https://skinmc.net/totem
